agent.name: Alchemy Agent
agent.description: On-chain intelligence powered by Alchemy. Wallet profiling, whale tracking, and price monitoring across 100+ chains.

secrets.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
secrets.description: Anthropic API key (required if using Claude models)

secrets.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
secrets.description: OpenAI API key (required if using GPT models)

tasks.name: whale-tracker
tasks.prompt: Check watchlist wallets for new activity since last check. Report any significant transfers.

tasks.name: price-monitor
tasks.prompt: Check current prices for all monitored tokens and NFT collections. Report any moves greater than the alert threshold.
